text.title: Growth Loops, Trend Usage, Conversion Funnel, and Case Studies
text.summary: Trend adaptation workflow, TikTok conversion funnel, growth loops (duets/stitches/series), real case studies.

rule.statement: Post trend-adapted content within 24-48 hours of a trend starting; trends that are 72+ hours old deliver 50-80% fewer views.
rule.rationale: TikTok's algorithm boosts trending sound usage during the early adoption phase; late adoption gets no boost and may look derivative.

list.item: Check Discover page daily; browse For You Page for 10 min
Identify the trend pattern: structure, twist, and audio type
Adapt to your niche: same structure, your industry context, your unique angle
Film and post within 24 hours of identifying the trend

section.title: Conversion Funnel
section.p: Views → Profile visits → Link clicks → Leads/Sales. The secondary path: Followers → Repeat exposure → Trust → Conversion.

rule.statement: Optimize the link in bio for mobile conversion; the profile visit → link click step is the highest drop-off point in the TikTok funnel.
rule.rationale: Most TikTok traffic lands on a profile page then clicks bio link; a non-mobile-optimized landing page wastes the entire top-of-funnel effort.

list.item: Link in bio: Linktree or direct landing page (mobile-optimized)
Pinned video: place your best converting video at the top of profile
Comment replies with CTA: respond to questions with link mention
Lead capture: free resource (checklist, template), Discord invite, newsletter

rule.statement: Target duet/stitch creators with 50K-500K followers in your niche; mega-creators (1M+) deliver lower follow-back rates and less targeted audiences.
rule.rationale: Mid-tier niche creators have more engaged, specific audiences that match B2B/SaaS ICPs. Mega-creator audiences are too broad for most product offers.

list.item: Duets/Stitches: leverage others' audiences, expect 2-5x views on duet videos
Series content ("Part 1", "Part 2"): keep viewers coming back, higher follower conversion
Cliffhangers: "Part 2 drops tomorrow" increases profile visit rate 3-5x — only use if Part 2 is ready to publish within 24 hours
Collaborations: tag other creators in your niche for shared audience access

example.note: Developer tool — 0 to 150K followers in 6 months
example.code: Strategy: Daily coding tips (15-30 sec), trending sounds + code tutorials, "Day X of learning [language]" series Results: 150K followers, 2M+ total views, 5K newsletter signups, $10K in course sales

example.note: B2B service — 200 to 25K followers in 4 months
example.code: Strategy: Industry myth-busting, quick tips for target ICP, case study storytimes, duets with industry content Results: 25K followers, 15 qualified leads/month, 3 enterprise clients ($50K+ deals)

section.title: Analytics Review Workflow

rule.statement: Review analytics weekly; focus on watch-time graphs (where do viewers drop off?) before any other metric.
rule.rationale: Drop-off point analysis reveals structural problems (weak transition, too-long intro) that can be fixed in the next video; other metrics only confirm results, not causes.

section.reference: Script to process TikTok Analytics CSV and surface watch-time patterns
